title: JWT Decoder
seoDescription: Free online JWT decoder. Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens instantly. View header, payload, and signature. Perfect for debugging authentication and API tokens.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the JWT Decoder
step1Desc: Paste your JWT token (e.g., eyJhbGciOi...) into the input field.
step2Desc: Click Decode to instantly see the header, payload, and signature of your token.
step3Desc: Review the decoded claims like iss, sub, exp, iat. Check token expiration and user information.
faq1Q: Is it safe to decode JWT here?
faq1A: Yes. All decoding happens in your browser. Your tokens are never sent to any server.
faq2A: Claims are key-value pairs in the payload like iss (issuer), sub (subject), exp (expiration), and iat (issued at).
faq3A: This tool decodes the token but does not verify cryptographic signatures. Use jwt.io or backend libraries for verification.
